feed.title: AO3 - Jason Todd/Reader (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Jason Todd/Reader on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: In Every Life, In Every Moment
entry.summary:
Author: Im_a_hoe_for_angst

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 24,057Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 8

Summary: "Hearts are wild things, that's why our ribs are cages." ⋆｡°✩ “Turn on the TV. Channel Four.” You blink blearily at your alarm clock on your nightstand. It reads 3:26 AM. Maybe you’re still asleep, because there's no way you’re hearing whoever’s voice is sounding on the other end. Maybe you’re hallucinating.“Jason?? Is that you? What-““Shira, please.”A pause. You hear his ragged breaths on the other side of the line. You consider hanging up. Your voice comes out low, angry.“You got real nerve, you know that? Son of a… argh! Fine!”You turn on the tv, to find Cobblepots warehouse going up in flames. His breaths are heavy, and he sounds pained as he huffs out a sentence.“See that? I did that... Just wanted someone to know.” . ݁₊ ⊹ . ݁ ⟡ ݁ . ⊹ ₊ ݁. "I would recognize you in total darkness, were you mute and I deaf, I would recognize you in another whole life entirely, in different bodies, different times."

entry.title: Baby’s First Creature-Feature
entry.summary:
Author: TheGoldenPath

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 52,432Chapters: 13/?Kudos: 85

Summary: Excerpt~She’s reading to him, a generator manual that looks well read. The pages are yellow and water stained around her long fingers. His vision lazily trails from the book to his bloodied sheets and back to the stranger. Is he hallucinating a comforting presence to make his reality less burdensome? When had his visions ever been pleasant?A pretty girl to sit by his bedside and comfort him in his death. He tries to reach out and touch her hand, just to see if she’s a fantasy meant to remind him of everything he never fully had only for the pain to jolt up his entire abdomen. Summary~Jason awakes on an alternate earth whose only occupants is a secretive girl and a strange dog. He struggles to bring them home as a presence works in the shadows to control them. He learns the hard way that some secrets are best left alone. Dedicated to all the fawns that had to grow sharp teeth so they could defend themselves❤️

entry.title: The cute bookworm secret
entry.summary:
Author: Heartbeat_in_japanese

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,149Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 45

Summary: Jason walks down the snowy streets of Gotham, a bag full of books in one hand and the other stuck warmly in the pockets of his bomber jacket. Your apartment isn’t far from where he parked his bike, but enough snow falls for it to lie on his hair, adding some more white strands to the black ones.

entry.title: Even the Sun Cries Sometimes
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 845Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 24

Summary: He wasn’t supposed to see you like this. You never intended to look so… small in front of him. You were the sunshine in a room, the light in the dark. Happy, bubbly, bright. People looked up to you, turned to you for guidance or assistance. You were the strong one, the one who had everything together. When others doubted themselves, you were their cheerleader. When other people were struggling to learn, you were their teacher. When someone needed support, you were their shoulder to cry on. He saw you that way too. He said as much. So for him to see you like this was… something. Something else. Something not good. OR: I got in my feels and decided to write an entirely self-indulgent fic about being held by one of my favourite characters

entry.title: Don’t act surprised when it barges in anyway
entry.summary:
Author: vanillameringuecookie

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,077Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 62

Summary: Working under a pseudonym as a burglar was supposed to be the easy way out of your miserable life. But in a twisted turn, tangled up with stuff you shouldn’t have ever messed with, Red Hood finds you. That might be the worst thing that’s happened to you. follow my tumblr: vanillameringuecookie

entry.title: Apartment 3B
entry.summary:
Author: ElaineInABox

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 86,123Chapters: 22/22Kudos: 1,184

Summary: You weren’t looking for love, just somewhere cheap, quiet, and safe enough to get you through the semester. Jason Todd wasn’t looking for company, just a roommate who wouldn’t ask questions about why he came home at two AM bloody and bruised.But in a cramped apartment in Crime Alley, between burnt coffee, leaky ceilings, and the soft hum of the city that never sleeps, the silence between you starts to change. What begins as survival becomes something quieter, steadier—something that almost feels like home.

entry.title: The Bloom Knot
entry.summary:
Author: nocteris

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 51,799Chapters: 14/24Kudos: 159

Summary: Getting a soulmate was the last thing Jason needed as a young academic getting his PhD. Getting a soulmate was the last thing on your mind as a freshman. But one accidental shove and a falling pitcher of orange juice later, suddenly the both of you are soul bound to someone you’ve just met. Suddenly, you’re everywhere. In his classroom, in his notifications, in every line he reads. Suddenly, he’s everywhere. In the hallways, in the hum of your guitar strings, in the equations you solve. But seeing the others— Dick and Kory, Bruce and Selina, Damian and Jon— they all got to choose their soulmates. So in the eyes of fate, where did that leave the two of you?

entry.title: Hangman's Trick // J. Todd
entry.summary:
Author: themoonunderstandsmyneeds

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 34,583Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 49

Summary: They were the best of friends, the girl and the boy from the slums. Hunched over books together in the library, vicious games of uno, movies and popcorn on the couch, tending to each other's scrapes and cuts, sleepovers, nights on the rooftops of Gotham, two children playing at being heroes. They never knew what awaited them, the horrors and traumas that were just a breath away. They haven't seen each other in over seven years, he's supposed to be dead, she's supposed to have moved on. But, nothing is the way it's supposed to be.   ( A/N: not the best summary but you get the point lol. don't expect this to be a comic accurate story. i will do my best to keep characters how they are represented in their media but i'm not holding myself to any particular story line. consider this an AU if you will. please check TW's. i will put chapter specific ones in the notes at the start of every chapter but for the first chapter i will try and cover all the potential triggers this story will cover. anyways, essentially this is a story where you are jason's childhood best friend, who isn't aware that he is alive. don't expect everything to make perfect sense, we will gain more backstory as we progress. enjoy xx.)

entry.title: Two Birds
entry.summary:
Author: queen_of_morons

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,227Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 6

Summary: The Peregrine Project.A mission made to train a specialized individual to take down Robin.There are quite a few flaws in this system though. Firstly, the girl being trained is not ready to take down Robin. Secondly, she can't help but to become friends with that same Robin. Thirdly, she thinks she falls in love with that Robin. It's your mission to kill him but you love him.

entry.title: How to exist
entry.summary:
Author: MelMellie

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 883Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 2

Summary: "You were always hurt, no matter how much you dissociate, no matter how you didn't even want to live anymore, eventually, on those quiet nights when no one came to your room "to play" with you , when were left with your own thoughts, everything, all that anger, misery hit you all at once. In those moments every single bit of hope you had kept hidden in your heart all these years disappeared. That's how your life was until you met him. He, he who looked at you, who saw you, truly saw you and decided you were still worth saving. Him, who beat up every awful men and just took you like it didn't change your life forever."TW : mentions of rape/non con

entry.title: Do I Wanna Know?
entry.summary:
Author: chlo_caineandabel

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,282Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 17

Summary: At what point does a stranger become your friend? When you first talk to them? When you share your secrets with them? And when they drift away, do they once again become a stranger even while knowing your deepest secrets? You were siting alone in the park with seventeen minutes left till midnight. Seventeen minutes left of your birthday. A slightly stale cupcake you received from the bakery that closed ten minutes ago sits beside you on the bench. The moon rolls about in the sky as it slowly takes its place in the dark canvas of the sky. Out of the silence of the night, you hear someone's voice. "What brings you out here so late at night?"

entry.title: Regrets do die hard
entry.summary:
Author: PlsGiveMeBFnamjoonChuseyo

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,576Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 15

Summary: Soulmates do exist. And when they do find one another they experience severe head ache and witness eachothers memories and each others initials appear on their wrists. He never did want to find his soulmate. But he did. And.. maybe deep down he always wanted to find his soulmate. So when he did.. why did she run away? (1st part of the story is of Jason when he was Robin, 17-years-old. No sexual implications, obviously)(2nd part of the story is after jason resurrects. There will be more plot in this part!! And maybe smut idk)

entry.title: As If It Were Meant To Be
entry.summary:
Author: ghostiequill

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,913Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 8

Summary: After a humiliating day at your dead-end charity job, the last thing you expect is a knock at your door telling you you're royalty The second to last thing? Being told you're to be married to the infamous prince, Jason Todd. He's a problem, you're the last resort solution Neither of you asked for this, but you might be the only ones who are able to understand each other.
